name: digital-compass-mcp
description: Digital Compass MCP — Romanian digital-crisis playbooks as tools for AI agents: match a user's situation (phishing link, hacked account, purchase scam, fraud call) to a step-by-step playbook, fetch the full guidance as markdown, list real Romanian reporting channels (DNSC 1911, Police, banks). Public-good content, CC BY 4.0, plain language.
